name: Manicule
description: Manicule — AI-powered document extraction and processing platform for structured data from unstructured enterprise docs.

seo.title: Manicule — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Manicule: Manicule — AI-powered document extraction and processing platform for structured data from unstructured enterprise docs.

when_to_use: Extracting structured fields from unstructured enterprise documents
Building document processing pipelines for compliance and legal
Automating invoice, contract, and report data extraction at scale
Replacing manual data entry with AI document understanding API

pros: Good for structured extraction from PDFs
Focused product vs broad OCR suites
cons: Crowded space vs Unstract, Sensible, Reducto
review.verdict: Worth piloting against rivals when you have real enterprise document extraction pain.
review.best_for: Ops and finance teams extracting structured data from enterprise docs
review.not_for: Simple invoice parsing where a generic vision LLM is enough

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
